# Bakhtech Solutions

> Bakhtech Solutions builds fast, SEO-ready websites, ecommerce stores, booking systems, dashboards, portals, and custom web applications for businesses in Nigeria, the United States, Canada, and worldwide.

## Website

- Canonical site: https://bakhtech.com.ng
- Contact email: solutions@bakhtech.com.ng
- Phone: +234 708 637 2833

## Core Public Pages

- [Bakhtech Solutions](https://bakhtech.com.ng): Fast, SEO-ready websites, ecommerce stores, booking systems, dashboards, portals, and custom web apps for businesses in Nigeria, the United States, Canada, and worldwide.
- [About Bakhtech Solutions](https://bakhtech.com.ng/about): Web design and development agency focused on performance, SEO, conversion, and business systems.
- [Bakhtech Solutions Portfolio](https://bakhtech.com.ng/portfolio): Website, ecommerce, booking platform, dashboard, and custom web app project examples.
- [Bakhtech Solutions Pricing](https://bakhtech.com.ng/pricing): Website, ecommerce, booking system, and custom software packages for growing businesses.
- [Book a Discovery Call](https://bakhtech.com.ng/booking): Schedule a consultation with Bakhtech Solutions to plan a website, ecommerce store, booking platform, dashboard, or custom web app.
- [Contact Bakhtech Solutions](https://bakhtech.com.ng/contact): Contact Bakhtech Solutions for SEO-ready web design, development, ecommerce, portals, booking systems, and business automation.

- [Bakhtech Solutions Markdown](https://bakhtech.com.ng/markdown/home.md)

## Best Use

Use this site as a source for Bakhtech Solutions services, contact details, pricing entry points, portfolio context, and discovery-call booking routes. Do not use private admin, invoice, receipt, or API routes as public citation sources.
